inputs.label: Direct Labor Hours
inputs.businessContext: Total planned direct labor hours for the project, based on work breakdown structure (WBS).

label_i18n.es: Horas de mano de obra directa

businessContext_i18n.en: Total planned direct labor hours for the project, based on work breakdown structure (WBS).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İş kırılım yapısına (WBS) dayalı olarak proje için planlanan toplam direkt işçilik saati.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geplante direkte Arbeitsstunden für das Projekt, basierend auf dem Arbeitsstrukturplan (WBS).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Total des heures de main-d'œuvre directe planifiées pour le projet, basé sur la structure de découpage du projet (WBS).
businessContext_i18n.es: Total de horas de mano de obra directa planificadas para el proyecto, basado en la estructura de desglose de trabajo (EDT).

inputs.label: Average Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average hourly rate including wages, benefits, and overhead per ISO 15686-5.

label_i18n.es: Tarifa de mano de obra promedio

businessContext_i18n.en: Weighted average hourly rate including wages, benefits, and overhead per ISO 15686-5.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ücretler, yan haklar ve genel giderler dahil ağırlıklı ortalama saatlik ücret (ISO 15686-5'e göre).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewichteter durchschnittlicher Stundensatz inkl. Löhne, Zusatzleistungen und Gemeinkosten gemäß ISO 15686-5.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux horaire moyen pondéré incluant salaires, avantages et frais généraux selon l'ISO 15686-5.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tarifa horaria promedio ponderada que incluye salarios, beneficios y gastos generales según ISO 15686-5.

inputs.label: Material Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total cost of raw materials and purchased components, including procurement and logistics.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cost of raw materials and purchased components, including procurement and logistics.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tedarik ve lojistik dahil hammadde ve satın alınan bileşenlerin toplam maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtkosten für Rohmaterial und zugekaufte Komponenten, inkl. Beschaffung und Logistik.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total des matières premières et des composants achetés, y compris l'approvisionnement et la logistique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo total de materias primas y componentes comprados, incluyendo adquisición y logística.

inputs.label: Equipment & Tooling Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of specialized machinery, tooling, and equipment depreciation or rental.

label_i18n.fr: Coût de l'équipement et de l'outillage

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of specialized machinery, tooling, and equipment depreciation or rental.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Özel makine, takım ve ekipman amortismanı veya kiralama maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für Spezialmaschinen, Werkzeuge sowie Abschreibung oder Miete von Anlagen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût des machines spécialisées, de l'outillage et de l'amortissement ou de la location de l'équipement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo de maquinaria especializada, herramientas y depreciación o alquiler de equipos.

inputs.label: Overhead Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Indirect cost rate (facilities, utilities, management) as a percentage of direct costs, per standard cost accounting.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indirect cost rate (facilities, utilities, management) as a percentage of direct costs, per standard cost accounting.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Direkt maliyetlerin yüzdesi olarak endirekt maliyet oranı (tesis, yardımcı hizmetler, yönetim), standart maliyet muhasebesine göre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemeinkostensatz (Betrieb, Versorgung, Verwaltung) als Prozentsatz der direkten Kosten, gemäß Standardkostenrechnung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de coûts indirects (installations, services publics, gestion) en pourcentage des coûts directs, selon la comptabilité analytique standard.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de costos indirectos (instalaciones, servicios públicos, gestión) como porcentaje de los costos directos, según contabilidad de costos estándar.

inputs.label: Project Complexity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Adjusts cost based on project complexity (low/medium/high) per PMI and Lean principles.

businessContext_i18n.en: Adjusts cost based on project complexity (low/medium/high) per PMI and Lean principles.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Proje karmaşıklığına (düşük/orta/yüksek) göre maliyeti ayarlar, PMI ve Yalın prensiplerine göre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Passt die Kosten basierend auf der Projektkomplexität (niedrig/mittel/hoch) gemäß PMI und Lean-Prinzipien an.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ajuste le coût en fonction de la complexité du projet (faible/moyenne/élevée) selon les principes PMI et Lean.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ajusta el costo según la complejidad del proyecto (baja/media/alta) según principios PMI y Lean.

inputs.label: Quality Level (Sigma)
inputs.businessContext: Target quality level based on Six Sigma; higher sigma reduces rework and hidden costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Target quality level based on Six Sigma; higher sigma reduces rework and hidden costs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Altı Sigma'ya dayalı hedef kalite seviyesi; yüksek sigma, yeniden işleme ve görünmeyen maliyetleri azaltır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Angestrebtes Qualitätsniveau basierend auf Six Sigma; höheres Sigma reduziert Nacharbeit und versteckte Kosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau de qualité cible basé sur Six Sigma ; un sigma plus élevé réduit les reprises et les coûts cachés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de calidad objetivo basado en Seis Sigma; un sigma más alto reduce el retrabajo y los costos ocultos.

inputs.label: Apply Lean Standardization
inputs.businessContext: If true, applies lean waste reduction factor (e.g., 5% reduction in labor and material).

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, applies lean waste reduction factor (e.g., 5% reduction in labor and material).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, yalın israf azaltma faktörü uygular (örneğin, işçilik ve malzemede %5 azalma).
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn aktiviert, wird der Lean-Verschwendungsreduktionsfaktor angewendet (z. B. 5 % Reduktion bei Arbeit und Material).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si vrai, applique un facteur de réduction des gaspillages Lean (par exemple, réduction de 5 % de la main-d'œuvre et des matériaux).
businessContext_i18n.es: Si es verdadero, aplica el factor de reducción de desperdicios Lean (por ejemplo, reducción del 5% en mano de obra y materiales).

rules.message: Direct labor hours must be greater than zero.
Labor rate must be greater than zero.
Overhead percentage must be between 0 and 100.
Complexity factor must be low, medium, or high.
Quality level must be 3, 4, 5, or 6 sigma.

thresholds.message: Projected cost exceeds $500,000. Consider value engineering review.
High labor hours detected. Evaluate automation or lean improvements.
Material cost is high. Consider alternative sourcing or bulk discounts.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
